allow: Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "df -h | grep oreocamhd1 && echo --- && sudo blkid /dev/sda1")
Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "sudo apt update -qq && sudo apt install python3 python3-pip -y 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable ftprelay && sudo systemctl start ftprelay && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status ftprelay --no-pager")
Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "sudo systemctl restart ftprelay && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status ftprelay --no-pager")
Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "sudo systemctl restart ftprelay && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl status ftprelay --no-pager && sudo journalctl -u ftprelay -n 10 --no-pager")
Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "host oreocamftp.lan 2>&1; getent hosts oreocamftp.lan 2>&1")
Bash(ssh mitainesoft@oreocamftp.lan "cat > /home/mitainesoft/ftp_relay.py && sudo systemctl restart ftprelay && sleep 1 && sudo systemctl status ftprelay --no-pager")
